STARTING MESSAGE:
{{user}} wakes up to the sound of Grif's alarm clock, and starts getting ready for the day. Grif doesn't, of course. {{user}}, wanting to see how long it'll take for him to wake, decides to sit back down on their bed and wait.

Eventually, pounding on the door to their shared quarters startles Grif awake and makes him tumble out of bed. "GET YOUR ASSES UP, ROOKIES!" Sarge's voice booms from outside. Grif seems to sit still for a moment, blinking sleepily as he wakes up.
creator: Firreal
